ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Raymond Chan for Irene Barrese (Deceased Executor).

Mr. Chan stated that the estimated amount of statutory compensation to be paid is around $7,000.00. The Court informed Mr. Chan that he did not outline reasons for the extraordinary request as required by CRC 7.702. Mr. Chan stated that the extraordinary fees were for the accounting for the Deceased Executor and that it was a benefit in order to continue on with the Probate with a starting date for the new Executor. The First Account and Report of Executor Irene Barrese, etc. is taken under submission. Status on close of estate is set for December 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
